activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline

oracleReaderQuery.value:
SELECT DISTINCT 
  r.proj_id, r.r_code, rn.description, r.r_supp supplement, decode(actual_ind, 'Y', 'P', 'I') inq_pur_ind, r.approved_date, rli.RLI_POS itemno, rli.RLI_sub_POS itemsub  
, i.IDENT_CODE ident, cc.commodity_code, i.input_1, i.input_2, i.input_3, i.input_4, i.input_5
, substr(UPPER(m_pck_std_custom.ident_desc(rli.ident, 1)),1,400) IDENT_DESCRIPTION
, to_char(rli.TOTAL_RELEASE_QTY) total_qty  
, to_char(nvl(rli.total_release_qty,0) - NVL(rli.last_total_release_qty,0)) increased_qty
, m_pck_req_custom.WEIGHT(rli.ident) unit_weight
, upper(u2.unit_code) weight_code      
, job_number accountcode
, upper(u1.unit_code) qty_unit
, dd.dd_code "Delivery Designation"
, rli.estimated_ros_date ROS_Date                                                       
, rli.tag_number  tag_number     
--, client_code 
, m_abb_pck_bom.ident_cc_layout2(i.ident,'L',1) "Long Description"
, nvl(rli.rli_comment, '') "Comment"
FROM 
  m_sys.m_reqs r,
  m_sys.m_req_line_items rli,
  m_sys.m_req_status rst,
  m_sys.m_req_nls rn,
  m_sys.m_jobs j,
  m_sys.m_units u1,                                                  
  m_sys.M_UNITS u2,  
  m_sys.m_idents i,
  m_sys.m_commodity_codes cc,
  m_sys.m_delv_desigs dd
WHERE 1=1
  AND r.r_id = rli.r_id
  AND r.rst_id = rst.rst_id 
  AND r.r_id = rn.r_id 
  AND rli.dd_id = dd.dd_id 
  AND rli.job_id = j.job_id (+) 
  AND rli.ident =  i.ident  
  AND i.commodity_id = cc.commodity_id  
  AND u1.unit_id = rli.qty_unit_id 
  AND upper(u2.unit_id) = rli.weight_UNIT_ID
  AND r.approved_date is not null  -- not needed Moses, 19-Nov 
  AND r.proj_id = '@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}'
  ORDER BY r.r_code,r.r_supp,rli.rli_pos,rli.rli_sub_pos

text.value:
@concat('update [epr].[',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters_2').output.firstRow.table_name,']','
set week_end_date =
(case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Saturday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 6 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Sunday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 5  as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Monday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 4 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Tuesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 3 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Wednesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 2 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Thursday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 1 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Friday','''',' then cast(getdate() as date)
end
end
end
end
end
end
end)
where week_end_date is NULL
and PROJ_ID = ','''',pipeline().parameters.proj_id,'''')

@concat('delete from [epr].[',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters_2').output.firstRow.table_name,']',' where (week_end_date =
(case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ',
'''',
'Saturday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 6 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Sunday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 5  as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Monday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 4 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Tuesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 3 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Wednesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 2 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Thursday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 1 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Friday','''',' then cast(getdate() as date)
end
end
end
end
end
end
end)
or week_end_date is null)
and PROJ_ID = ','''',pipeline().parameters.proj_id,'''')
